scripts.dev:suite: concurrently -n suite:popjot,suite:popkey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:popjot --prefix app" "npm run dev:popkey --prefix app"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey,suite,site -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run typecheck --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run typecheck --prefix app/modules/popkey" "npm run typecheck --prefix app" "npm run typecheck --prefix site"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey,site -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run lint --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run lint --prefix app/modules/popkey" "npm run lint --prefix site"
scripts.test: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run test --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run test --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.guard:pro: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run guard:pro --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run guard:pro --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.verify: npm run guard:pro && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
